title: Build a Checkout Page
description: An accessible checkout page with two sections: a cart preview showing an item image and price, and a payment form with card name, card number, expiry date, and CVV inputs. Required fields are visually marked with an asterisk inside an aria-hidden span. The card number input uses aria-describedby to link to a helper paragraph explaining the expected format.
objectives: Use aria-hidden to hide decorative asterisks from screen readers
Use aria-describedby to link an input to its helper text
Mark required fields with the required attribute
Associate every input with a label using matching id and for
Structure a checkout page with semantic section elements
